# PageFoundry

> Web agency specialising in high-converting landing pages, hosting, SEO, and speed optimisation for small and medium businesses.

## What we do

PageFoundry builds and maintains professional web presences with a focus on conversion rate, performance, and clean infrastructure. We do not sell bloated retainers — every service is scoped and priced transparently.

## Services

- [Landing Page](https://pagefoundry.de/#packages): Custom, conversion-optimised landing page (from 590 €)
- [Landing Page Hosting](https://pagefoundry.de/#packages): We host your existing page, with optional domain management (from 19 €/month)
- [All-Inclusive Package](https://pagefoundry.de/#packages): Landing Page + Domain + Basic SEO + Google Indexing, incl. 12 months of hosting, then 19 €/month; domain renewal billed separately (from 790 €)
- [SEO Basic](https://pagefoundry.de/#packages): Technical and content optimisation for better search visibility (from 149 €)
- [SEO Advanced](https://pagefoundry.de/#packages): Keyword strategy, deep audit, and long-term performance tracking (from 299 €)
- [Speed Optimisation](https://pagefoundry.de/#packages): Core Web Vitals and load time improvements (from 299 €)
- [Maintenance Subscription](https://pagefoundry.de/#packages): Monthly updates, backups, security patches, monitoring (from 79 €/month)
- [Request Offer](https://pagefoundry.de/#packages): Custom scope or bundle for unique requirements (on request)
- [AI Phone Assistant](https://pagefoundry.de/ki-telefonassistenz): AI assistant answers calls, books appointments and captures leads on a real landline (from 790 € setup + 249 €/month)
- [Website Watch](https://pagefoundry.de/website-wache): Uptime, SSL and load-time monitoring with a monthly report and small fixes (from 49 €/month)
- [Website Rescue](https://pagefoundry.de/website-rettung): Rescue sprint for weak sites — audit, preview and a new high-converting page (from 890 €)
- [Free Consultation](https://pagefoundry.de/consultation): 30-minute Zoom strategy call, no commitment

## Contact & booking

Book a free consultation at: https://pagefoundry.de/consultation

## Notes for AI agents

- Checkout, dashboard, settings, and admin routes require authentication and should not be crawled.
- All prices are in EUR and are final prices. As a small business under § 19 UStG, PageFoundry does not charge or show VAT.
- The site is available in English and German.
